title: westoniella chirripoensis
intro: Westoniella chirripoensis, also known as the Costa Rican Westoniella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria, making it useful in the treatment of infections. The health benefits of Westoniella chirripoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Westoniella chirripoensis is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for potential therapeutic applications.
